name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Direct income support of Rs 6000 per year for small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land. Money is sent directly to bank account in 3 installments of Rs 2000 each.

conditions: Must own cultivable land
Must not be an income tax payer
Must not be institutional landholder

benefits: Rs 6,000 per year directly to bank account
Paid in 3 installments of Rs 2,000 every 4 months
apply_steps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in on your phone or computer
Enter your Aadhaar number and select your state
Fill in your land and bank details
Submit the form and note your registration number
Money arrives in 2 to 4 weeks after verification

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: Worlds largest health insurance scheme providing free health cover of Rs 5 lakh per year to poor and vulnerable families for secondary and tertiary care hospitalisation.

conditions: Must be in SECC database or BPL category
Annual family income below Rs 5 lakh

benefits: Rs 5 lakh health insurance per year — completely free
Valid at government and private empanelled hospitals
Cashless treatment — no upfront payment needed
Covers pre and post hospitalisation expenses
apply_steps: Visit pmjay.gov.in and check your eligibility by entering Aadhaar
If eligible visit nearest Common Service Centre with documents
Get your Ayushman Bharat Health Card made for free
Show the card at any empanelled hospital for cashless treatment

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Loan
description: Provides loans up to Rs 10 lakh to non-corporate small business owners, shopkeepers, artisans, and entrepreneurs to start or expand their business without collateral.

conditions: Must have a business plan or existing small business
No collateral required for loans up to Rs 10 lakh

benefits: Shishu — loans up to Rs 50,000 for new businesses
Kishore — loans from Rs 50,000 to Rs 5 lakh
Tarun — loans from Rs 5 lakh to Rs 10 lakh
documents: Business Plan or proof of existing business
apply_steps: Visit any nationalized bank, regional rural bank, or microfinance institution
Ask for Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana loan application
Fill the form and attach all documents
Bank will verify and process your application
Loan amount credited to your account within 7 to 10 days

name: PM Awas Yojana Gramin
description: Provides financial assistance to rural households to construct a pucca house with basic amenities. A grant of Rs 1.2 to 1.3 lakh is given directly — no repayment needed.

conditions: Must live in rural area
Must not own a pucca house
Must be in SECC 2011 list

benefits: Rs 1.2 lakh grant in plain areas — no repayment
Rs 1.3 lakh grant in hilly and difficult areas
Additional Rs 12,000 for toilet construction under Swachh Bharat
apply_steps: Visit your local Gram Panchayat office
Ask for PMAY Gramin registration form
Panchayat staff will help you fill the form
A government officer will visit to verify your housing status
After approval money is transferred in instalments as construction progresses

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Scheme to ensure the survival, protection and education of the girl child. Provides financial incentives and educational support for families with girl children.

conditions: Must have a girl child
Girl child must be below 10 years for Sukanya Samriddhi account

benefits: Sukanya Samriddhi Account — 8 percent interest for girl child savings
Free education for girls up to Class 8
Conditional cash transfers for girl child education and health
apply_steps: Visit nearest post office or bank to open Sukanya Samriddhi Account
Carry girl child birth certificate and parent Aadhaar
Minimum deposit Rs 250 to open account
For other benefits visit nearest Anganwadi or district office

name: PM SVANidhi Street Vendor Loan
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Provides affordable working capital loans to street vendors to resume their livelihoods that were adversely affected during the Covid pandemic. No collateral required.

conditions: Must be a street vendor
Must have vending certificate or letter of recommendation from Town Vending Committee

benefits: Initial loan of Rs 10,000 without collateral
Enhanced loan of Rs 20,000 on timely repayment
Further enhanced loan of Rs 50,000 on continued good repayment
Digital transaction incentive of Rs 1200 per year
documents: Letter of Recommendation from Urban Local Body
apply_steps: Check eligibility and apply online or at bank branch
Repay on time to get higher loan next time

name: National Scholarship Portal
description: Single portal for students to apply for various central and state government scholarships. Covers pre-matric, post-matric and merit-cum-means scholarships for students from weaker sections.

conditions: Must be enrolled in recognized institution
Family annual income below Rs 2.5 lakh for most schemes
Must have passed previous examination with minimum marks

benefits: Covers studies from Class 1 to PhD level
apply_steps: Register with your Aadhaar number and mobile
Select your scholarship scheme from the list
Fill application form and upload documents
Submit before deadline shown on portal
Track status on the same portal

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Provides free LPG gas connections to women from Below Poverty Line households to replace dirty cooking fuels like wood and coal with clean LPG gas.

conditions: Must be a woman
Must be from BPL household
Must not already have LPG connection in household

benefits: First gas cylinder provided free of cost
Gas stove provided at subsidised rate
apply_steps: Visit nearest LPG distributor of any oil company
Ask for Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana application form
Fill form and submit BPL ration card and Aadhaar
Connection provided within 15 days of verification
Can also apply online at mylpg.in

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans between Rs 10 lakh and Rs 1 crore to at least one SC or ST borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises.

conditions: SC or ST category OR woman entrepreneur
Must be setting up a new enterprise in manufacturing, services or trading
Borrower must not be in default to any bank

benefits: Loan from Rs 10 lakh to Rs 1 crore
apply_steps: Register on the portal and fill in business details
Connect with nearest bank branch through portal
Submit business plan and documents to bank

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance scheme offering Rs 2 lakh cover for accidental death or permanent disability at just Rs 20 per year premium. Available to all bank account holders aged 18 to 70.

conditions: Must have a bank account with Aadhaar linked
Must be aged 18 to 70 years

benefits: Rs 2 lakh on accidental death or permanent total disability
Rs 1 lakh on permanent partial disability
Only Rs 20 per year premium — auto debited from bank
documents: Aadhaar Card linked to bank account
apply_steps: Visit your bank branch or net banking portal
Ask to enroll in Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
Rs 20 will be auto debited from your account every year
You are covered immediately after enrollment

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests or diseases. Covers all food and oilseed crops.

conditions: Must be a farmer with cultivable land
Must have taken crop loan from bank
Must insure crop before sowing season

benefits: Only 2 percent premium for Kharif crops
Only 1.5 percent premium for Rabi crops
Full sum insured paid in case of crop loss
Covers natural calamities, pests and diseases
apply_steps: Visit your bank where you have crop loan
Ask for Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana enrollment
Fill the form with crop and land details
Insurance active from sowing to harvest

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers. Guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 1000 to Rs 5000 after age 60 based on contribution amount. Government co-contributes for eligible subscribers.

conditions: Must have bank account with Aadhaar linked
Must not be income tax payer
Must not be covered under any statutory social security scheme

benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension from Rs 1000 to Rs 5000 after age 60
Government co-contribution of 50 percent for 5 years for eligible subscribers
Pension continues to spouse after subscriber death
Nominee gets corpus amount after both deaths
apply_steps: Visit your bank branch with Aadhaar and bank passbook
Fill Atal Pension Yojana enrollment form
Monthly contribution auto-debited from your account
Can also enroll through net banking or mobile banking

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
description: Financial inclusion scheme providing zero balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, accident insurance cover and overdraft facility to every household.

conditions: Must not have any bank account
Must have Aadhaar or any identity proof

benefits: Zero balance bank account — no minimum balance required
Rs 10,000 overdraft facility after 6 months of satisfactory operation
Direct benefit transfer of government schemes
documents: Aadhaar Card or any identity proof
apply_steps: Visit any bank branch with Aadhaar card
Ask for Jan Dhan account opening form
Fill simple form and submit documents

name: PM Awas Yojana Urban
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Provides financial assistance to urban poor for construction or purchase of house. Offers interest subsidy on home loans and direct grant for house construction.

conditions: Must live in urban area
Must not own pucca house in any part of India
Annual household income below Rs 18 lakh

benefits: Interest subsidy up to Rs 2.67 lakh on home loans
Direct grant of Rs 1.5 lakh for EWS category
Covers new construction and house purchase
apply_steps: Fill online application with income and property details
Submit application and note application number
Visit nearest bank for home loan with subsidy

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Provides apprenticeship training to youth in industry with monthly stipend. Government shares 25 percent of stipend cost with employers to promote apprenticeship opportunities.

conditions: Must have passed Class 5 or above
Must be willing to undergo apprenticeship training

benefits: Monthly stipend from Rs 5000 to Rs 9000 based on qualification
On-the-job training in real industry environment
Certificate recognized by Government of India
Training period from 6 months to 3 years

name: PM Kisan Maan Dhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers. Provides guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 3000 after age 60 with matching contribution from government.

conditions: Must be small or marginal farmer with cultivable land up to 2 hectares
Must not be income tax payer

benefits: Guaranteed Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60
Government contributes equal amount as farmer
Family pension of Rs 1500 to spouse after farmer death
Voluntary exit with interest after 5 years
Nominee gets corpus if both die
apply_steps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre with documents
CSC operator will check eligibility and enroll you
Monthly contribution auto-debited from bank account
Contribution ranges from Rs 55 to Rs 200 based on age

name: National Health Mission
description: Provides free healthcare services including maternal health, child health, immunization, family planning and treatment of communicable diseases at government health facilities.

conditions: Available to all citizens
Services provided at government health centers

benefits: Free maternal and child health services
Free treatment for TB, malaria, dengue
Janani Suraksha Yojana cash assistance for institutional delivery
apply_steps: Visit nearest Primary Health Centre or Community Health Centre
Register with Aadhaar or any identity proof
For maternal benefits register pregnancy at health center

name: Skill India Mission - PMKVY
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Provides free skill training to youth in various trades with government certification. Includes placement assistance and monetary rewards for successful candidates.

conditions: Must be school or college dropout or unemployed
Must be willing to undergo skill training

benefits: Average monetary reward of Rs 8000 on successful completion
apply_steps: Visit pmkvyofficial.org and find training center
Visit nearest training center with documents
Complete training and appear for assessment

name: Startup India Initiative
ministry: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade
description: Provides recognition, funding support, tax benefits and easier compliance for startups. Includes access to government tenders and intellectual property support.

conditions: Must have innovative business idea
Company incorporated as private limited or LLP
Annual turnover below Rs 100 crore

benefits: Self-certification for labor and environment laws
Access to Rs 10,000 crore fund of funds
80 percent rebate on patent filing fees
apply_steps: After recognition apply for various benefits

name: National Rural Livelihood Mission
description: Promotes self-employment and organization of rural poor through Self Help Groups. Provides skill training, credit linkage and market access to rural women.

conditions: Must be from rural area
Must be willing to join Self Help Group
Preferably women

benefits: Formation and strengthening of Self Help Groups
Revolving fund of Rs 15,000 per SHG
Community Investment Fund of Rs 1.3 lakh per SHG
Bank linkage for credit up to Rs 10 lakh
apply_steps: Contact nearest Block Development Office or Gram Panchayat
Join existing Self Help Group or form new group with 10-15 women
Access credit and other benefits through SHG

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Skill training and placement program for rural youth. Provides residential training with food and accommodation, certification and guaranteed placement assistance.

conditions: Must be from rural area
Must be willing to migrate for employment
Preference to BPL families

benefits: Free residential skill training with food and stay
Training in high-demand sectors like retail, hospitality, healthcare
Travel allowance and stipend during training
documents: BPL Ration Card or SECC data
apply_steps: Visit ddugky.gov.in to find training partners
Undergo residential training for 3 to 12 months
Get placed in organized sector job

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Life insurance scheme offering Rs 2 lakh cover for death due to any reason at just Rs 436 per year premium. Available to all bank account holders aged 18 to 50.

conditions: Must have bank account with Aadhaar linked
Must be aged 18 to 50 years

benefits: Rs 2 lakh life cover for death due to any reason
documents: Aadhaar Card linked to bank account
apply_steps: Visit your bank branch or net banking
Enroll in Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
Rs 436 auto debited annually from account

name: National Food Security Act
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Provides highly subsidized food grains to eligible households. Priority households get 5 kg per person per month at Rs 2-3 per kg. Antyodaya households get 35 kg per family.

conditions: Must have ration card
Must be in priority or Antyodaya category

benefits: Coarse grains at Rs 1 per kg
5 kg per person per month for priority households
35 kg per family for Antyodaya households
apply_steps: Visit nearest Fair Price Shop or Food and Civil Supplies office
Apply for ration card with documents
Collect subsidized food grains monthly from Fair Price Shop

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Provides additional 5 kg free food grains per person per month over and above the NFSA entitlement. Launched during COVID and continues to support poor families.

conditions: Must have ration card under NFSA
Automatic eligibility for all NFSA beneficiaries

benefits: Additional 5 kg free food grains per person per month
Over and above regular NFSA quota
apply_steps: If you have NFSA ration card you are automatically eligible
Visit Fair Price Shop with ration card
Collect regular quota plus additional 5 kg free

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households. Provides livelihood security through creation of durable assets in rural areas.

conditions: Must be from rural area
Must be willing to do unskilled manual work

benefits: Guaranteed 100 days employment per household per year
Wages paid as per state minimum wage rates
Work provided within 5 km of village
Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days
Payment directly to bank account within 15 days
apply_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat office with documents
Work provided within 15 days or unemployment allowance paid

name: Digital India Programme
description: Umbrella program to transform India into digitally empowered society. Provides digital infrastructure, digital literacy, and digital services to citizens.

conditions: Available to all citizens

benefits: Free digital literacy training through PMGDISHA
Access to government services online through DigiLocker, UMANG app
apply_steps: For digital literacy visit nearest Common Service Centre

name: UJALA - LED Bulb Distribution Scheme
description: Provides LED bulbs at highly subsidized rates to reduce electricity consumption and bills. Part of energy efficiency mission.

conditions: Must have electricity connection
Available to all consumers

benefits: 9 watt LED bulbs at Rs 70 only
Saves 85 percent electricity compared to incandescent bulbs
apply_steps: Show electricity bill and identity proof
Exchange old bulbs or buy new LED bulbs
Start saving on electricity bills immediately

name: Swachh Bharat Mission - Toilet Construction
description: Provides financial assistance of Rs 12,000 for construction of individual household toilets in rural and urban areas to achieve Open Defecation Free India.

conditions: Must not have toilet at home
Must own house or have permission from landlord

benefits: Additional benefits under PMAY if eligible
documents: House ownership proof or landlord permission
apply_steps: Visit Gram Panchayat or Municipal office
Apply for Swachh Bharat Mission toilet
Money transferred to account after verification

name: Jal Jeevan Mission
description: Aims to provide functional household tap water connection to every rural household. Ensures regular and adequate supply of potable water.

conditions: Must be from rural area
Must not have piped water connection

benefits: Free piped water connection to household
Assured supply of 55 liters per capita per day
Potable water quality as per BIS standards
Reduces drudgery of women in fetching water
Improves health and quality of life
apply_steps: Village level planning done by Gram Panchayat
Connection provided as per village plan
Nominal user charges for operation and maintenance

name: PM Shram Yogi Maan Dhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for unorganized workers earning up to Rs 15,000 per month. Provides guaranteed monthly pension of Rs 3000 after age 60.

conditions: Monthly income up to Rs 15,000
Must not be covered under EPFO, ESIC or NPS
Must not be income tax payer

benefits: Guaranteed Rs 3000 monthly pension after age 60
Government contributes equal amount as worker
Family pension of Rs 1500 to spouse
Low monthly contribution from Rs 55 to Rs 200

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana 4.0
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
description: Flagship skill development scheme providing industry-relevant skill training to youth. Focus on emerging technologies and Industry 4.0 skills.

conditions: Must be school or college dropout or unemployed
Must have basic literacy

benefits: Training in emerging technologies like AI, IoT, robotics
Monetary reward up to Rs 8000 on completion

name: One Nation One Ration Card
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
description: Enables migrant workers and their families to access subsidized food grains from any Fair Price Shop in India using same ration card.

conditions: Must have NFSA ration card
Aadhaar must be linked to ration card

benefits: Access food grains from any Fair Price Shop in India
No need to transfer ration card
documents: Aadhaar Card linked to ration card
apply_steps: Ensure Aadhaar is linked to your ration card
Visit any Fair Price Shop in India
Provide ration card number and Aadhaar

name: PM-DAKSH - Skill Development for Marginalized
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Provides free skill development training to marginalized communities including SC, OBC and minorities. Includes up-skilling, reskilling and entrepreneurship training.

conditions: Must belong to SC, OBC or minority community
Annual family income below Rs 3 lakh for OBC, Rs 2.5 lakh for others

benefits: Free skill training in various trades
apply_steps: Register with Aadhaar and caste certificate

name: Kisan Credit Card Scheme
description: Provides short term credit to farmers for cultivation and other needs at subsidized interest rates. Simple and hassle-free credit facility.

conditions: Must be farmer with cultivable land
Can be owner cultivator, tenant farmer or sharecropper

benefits: Credit limit based on cropping pattern and scale of finance
Interest rate only 7 percent per annum
Additional 3 percent interest subvention on prompt repayment
Life insurance cover up to Rs 50,000
apply_steps: Visit nearest bank branch with documents
Fill Kisan Credit Card application form
Bank verifies and sanctions credit limit

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with information on nutrient status of soil and recommendations on appropriate dosage of nutrients for improving soil health and fertility.

conditions: Must be farmer with cultivable land

benefits: Soil health card with nutrient status
apply_steps: Agriculture officer collects soil sample from your field
Sample tested at soil testing laboratory
Soil health card issued with recommendations

name: PM-KUSUM Solar Pump Scheme
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Provides financial support to farmers for installation of solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants on barren land. Reduces diesel dependency and electricity cost.

conditions: Must be farmer with cultivable or barren land
Must have electricity connection for Component C

benefits: 60 percent subsidy on solar pump installation
30 percent bank loan at low interest
Additional income from selling surplus power to grid
apply_steps: Visit nearest Agriculture or Renewable Energy office

name: Rashtriya Gokul Mission
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Aims to conserve and develop indigenous bovine breeds. Provides financial assistance for establishment of integrated cattle development centers and breed multiplication farms.

conditions: Must be engaged in dairy farming or animal husbandry
Must have land for cattle rearing

benefits: Financial assistance for setting up Gokul Grams
Marketing support for milk and milk products

name: Blue Revolution - Fisheries Development
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Integrated scheme for fisheries development. Provides financial assistance for fish farming, hatcheries, cold storage and marketing infrastructure.

conditions: Must have water body or willing to take up fish farming
Can be individual or group

benefits: 40 to 60 percent subsidy on fish farming infrastructure
Support for cold storage and ice plants
documents: Land or water body ownership proof

name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Sampada Yojana
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Aims to enhance fish production and productivity. Provides financial assistance for fisheries infrastructure, modernization and value chain development.

conditions: Must be engaged in fisheries or willing to start
Can be individual, group or entrepreneur

benefits: 40 to 60 percent subsidy for general category
Support for fish farming, hatcheries, feed mills
Subsidy for fishing vessels and equipment

name: PM Formalization of Micro Food Processing Enterprises
description: Provides financial, technical and business support to micro food processing enterprises. Aims to upgrade existing units and formalize unorganized sector.

conditions: Must have existing food processing unit or willing to start
Annual turnover below Rs 2 crore

benefits: 35 percent credit-linked subsidy on eligible project cost
Maximum subsidy Rs 10 lakh per unit
apply_steps: Get approval from district level committee

name: PM-WANI - Public WiFi Scheme
description: Promotes setting up of public WiFi hotspots by entrepreneurs. Provides framework for public data office aggregators to provide internet services.

conditions: Must be willing to set up public WiFi hotspot
No license fee required

benefits: No license fee for providing WiFi service
Low cost of setting up hotspot

name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integrated scheme for school education from pre-school to class 12. Provides free textbooks, uniforms, mid-day meals and quality education infrastructure.

conditions: Must be enrolled in government or government-aided school

benefits: Free bicycles for girls in secondary classes
apply_steps: Enroll child in nearest government school
Textbooks and uniforms distributed at start of academic year

name: Nai Roshni - Leadership Development for Minority Women
description: Provides leadership development training to women from minority communities. Empowers them with knowledge of government programs, legal rights and confidence building.

conditions: Must be woman from minority community
Preferably from BPL or EWS category

benefits: Information on government schemes and programs
apply_steps: Contact nearest Minority Welfare Department office
Register for Nai Roshni training program
Become community leader and help others

name: Namo Drone Didi Scheme
description: Provides drones to women Self Help Groups for agricultural purposes. Enables women to provide drone services to farmers for pesticide spraying and crop monitoring.

conditions: Must be member of women Self Help Group
SHG must be registered and active

benefits: Training on drone operation and maintenance
Opportunity to earn income by providing drone services
apply_steps: Selected SHGs receive drone and training
Start providing drone services to farmers

name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
description: Provides financial support and skill training to traditional artisans and craftspeople. Includes collateral-free loans, modern tools and market linkages.

conditions: Must be traditional artisan or craftsperson
Working with hands and tools in 18 identified trades

benefits: Collateral-free loan up to Rs 1 lakh at 5 percent interest
Additional loan up to Rs 2 lakh on timely repayment
Stipend of Rs 500 per day during training
apply_steps: Receive toolkit and apply for loan

name: PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
description: Provides subsidy for rooftop solar installation in residential houses. Aims to provide free electricity up to 300 units per month through solar power.

conditions: Must own residential house
Must have electricity connection

benefits: 60 percent subsidy for systems up to 2 kW
40 percent subsidy for additional capacity up to 3 kW
Free electricity up to 300 units per month
apply_steps: Apply for rooftop solar with capacity

name: Ayushman Arogya Mandir - Health and Wellness Centers
description: Upgraded health centers providing comprehensive primary healthcare including screening for NCDs, maternal and child health, and free essential medicines.

conditions: Available to all citizens

documents: Aadhaar Card or any identity proof
apply_steps: Register with Aadhaar or identity proof

name: Lakhpati Didi Scheme
description: Aims to make women SHG members earn Rs 1 lakh or more annually through skill training, credit linkage and market support. Part of women empowerment initiative.

conditions: Must be member of women Self Help Group
SHG must be active under NRLM

benefits: Credit linkage up to Rs 20 lakh per SHG
Support for value addition and processing
Target to earn Rs 1 lakh or more annually
apply_steps: Join women Self Help Group in your village
Start enterprise and earn Rs 1 lakh plus annually

name: PM CARES for Children Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Provides support to children who lost both parents or surviving parent or legal guardian during COVID-19 pandemic. Includes education, health insurance and monthly stipend.

conditions: Must have lost both parents or surviving parent during COVID-19
Age below 18 years at time of death of parents

benefits: Rs 4000 monthly stipend from age 18 to 23
Corpus of Rs 10 lakh at age 23
Free education from KG to professional courses
Health insurance of Rs 5 lakh under Ayushman Bharat
Support for higher education and skill training
apply_steps: Visit nearest District Child Protection Unit
Monthly stipend and education support provided

name: PM POSHAN - Mid Day Meal Scheme
description: Provides hot cooked mid-day meals to children in government and government-aided schools. Aims to improve nutritional status and encourage school attendance.

conditions: Must be enrolled in government or government-aided school from pre-primary to class 8

benefits: Free hot cooked meal every school day
Nutritious meal with prescribed calories and protein
apply_steps: Meal served daily during school hours
Menu includes rice, dal, vegetables, eggs

name: Mission Indradhanush - Universal Immunization
description: Aims to ensure full immunization of all children and pregnant women. Provides free vaccines against 12 vaccine-preventable diseases.

conditions: Children up to 2 years and pregnant women
Available to all

benefits: Vaccines for diphtheria, pertussis, tetanus, polio, measles, rubella, Japanese encephalitis, hepatitis B, pneumonia, meningitis, rotavirus diarrhea
Vaccination camps in villages and urban areas
documents: Birth certificate or any age proof
apply_steps: Visit nearest Anganwadi or Primary Health Centre
Attend vaccination sessions as per schedule
